name: Pool of Bethesda
oracleText:
Pool of Bethesda enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
{1}{W}, {T}: Untap target creature. If that creature had a counter on it, remove up to one counter from it.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional. Classics theme art uses L. Maier's "Pool of Bethesda" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Waters of Waiting

classics.sourceNotes: An eighteenth-century Bethesda image gives the location card a clear sacred-site identity.
